creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to bob from comment #0)

Hello Bob,

thank you for the patch and taking maintainership. I have only two questions and found one minor issue:

- Is there a specific need for GCC? I was able to compile it with CLANG without any problems (by applying that post-patch from 0.72.6).

- Is there a particular reason why the debug options are redundant? Both options are still supported by the configure script as far I can see.

The minor issue: If one goes to "Help" | "Credits" (or "Licence (GPL)" or "Change log" or "To do list") the popup dialogue brings always a blank field.

This might be because the files "CHANGELOG", "COPYING", etc. are now missing from ${PREFIX}/share/docs/dvdisaster. Is this intended?

Apart from those points everything looks pretty good and your patch should be available in the ports tree soon.
